goal: Automate extension creation and establish filesystem-first shared memory across parallel worktrees.

tasks.title: Extension Generator command
tasks.description: Add just new-extension <name> to scaffold a valid extension, spec, and unit test.

tasks.title: Shared memory filesystem core
tasks.description: Implement shared working memory using a path derived from Git common dir so multiple worktrees can share context.
acceptance_criteria: Two worktrees can read and write shared memory
Shared memory works without vector or database backends

tasks.title: Librarian extension and promotion flow
tasks.description: Add librarian commands for memory_set, memory_get, memory_search, and promotion into durable project memory.
acceptance_criteria: Shared entries can be promoted into .pi/memory
Sync status is recorded without making external backends mandatory

tasks.title: Docs, doctor, and validation
tasks.description: Update docs and doctor checks to reflect extension generation and shared-memory behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Automated tests cover generator and shared-memory foundations
